_publications._publicationTitle: Unraveling the development of cutaneous neurofibromas in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: aquaporin1 (Aqp1) and nestin (Nes) emerged as key markers for distinguishing nmSC subtypes
details: Combined with AQP1 staining to distinguish four distinct nmSC subpopulations based on expression levels
